arts.ttl: AC Milan defender Tomori turns down Tottenham approach
arts.sum: Fikayo Tomori wants to stay at AC Milan after advanced talks with Tottenham, according to Sky Italy.

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Milan Secures Gimenez, a New Striker Arrives
arts.sum: AC Milan have successfully acquired Santiago Gimenez from Feyenoord. The talented striker is set to arrive in Italy today to undergo medical examinations before signing a contract that will keep him at the club until June 2029. The deal will see Gimenez earn 2.5 million euros net per year. The post Done Deal: Milan Secures Gimenez, a New Striker Arrives appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Morata Seals Galatasaray Move as Milan Secure Gimenez
arts.sum: In a swift turn of events, Alvaro Morata's transfer from AC Milan to Galatasaray has been finalized. The Spanish striker is set to join the Turkish giants on a loan deal with an option to buy, which could potentially become an obligation if certain conditions are met. Morata has agreed to a contract that will keep him at Galatasaray until 2028. The post Done Deal: Morata Seals Galatasaray Move as Milan Secure Gimenez appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: AC Milan Step Up Efforts to Sign Joao Felix with Jorge Mendes Meeting
arts.sum: AC Milan are ramping up efforts to secure Joao Felix's signature in the final days of the transfer window. Calciomercato report that the Rossoneri are set to meet with super-agent Jorge Mendes to discuss a potential move for the Portuguese forward from Chelsea. The post AC Milan Step Up Efforts to Sign Joao Felix with Jorge Mendes Meeting appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter Only Willing to Sign Roma Outcast on One Condition
arts.sum: Roma ace Nicola Zalewski must put pen to paper on a new contract at the Stadio Olimpico before joining Serie A champions Inter. According to Tuttosport via FCInterNews, that's the only way for the 23-year-old to complete his loan move to Giuseppe Meazza. The post Inter Only Willing to Sign Roma Outcast on One Condition appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
